reviews.comment: I love Proff Hall so much! She does a really great job at connecting with her students. I felt like every day I showed up to her class she would always have a really positive mood which can be really important for students to also feel motivated in a classroom space. The classwork isn't too difficult, I had her for English 101. 10/10. I love her.
Overall nice professor and grades your work fairly, even if someone's opinion may be unpopular. Wish more professors were like her. If any has to take English 100 at WSU, enroll in her class.
Class was more difficult, and graded more harshly than it needed to be. Megan is a solid professor overall, well liked and is always eager to help.
reviews.ratingTags: Accessible outside class--Participation matters--Graded by few things

reviews.comment: Prof. Hall was so amazing I would consider her one of my favorites! She's very caring, helping all her students succeed, and works with her students individually to help them. Attendance is mandatory, but this is an easy and enjoyable class- I never even wanted to skip! If you go to class and do your homework on time, its easy to get a good grade!
I highly recommend to take English 101 with Hall! Was very helpful, caring, and easy to communicate with. I have never met an awesome professor like her. Plus shes an easy grader so take her class!!!

Such a good professor. By far my favorite one I have had. She cares about helping her students. 4 papers per semester to create a portfolio. The prompts are clear and she helps you throughout the class and gives work days. Definitely would recommend
reviews.ratingTags: Gives good feedback--ACCESSIBLE OUTSIDE CLASS--Clear grading criteria

reviews.comment: This was my favorite teacher ive ever had. her lectures and assignment prompts were clear and concise. 4 papers in the semester and she made them fun and easy to do. she was the sweetest professor and was very lenient when you had technical difficulties or had to miss class. super cool younger professor. I LOVED her. Take her class!
